name: Odd-Y
author: Bill Taylor (2015) / AGP port
description: Bill Taylor's generalisation of the Game of Y to boards with any odd number of sides. Place a stone each turn; corner cells count for both adjacent sides. Win by connecting three sides whose midpoint triangle contains the board's centre — on the pentagon (5-Y, Ea Ea's 'Star Y') that is any three sides except three consecutive ones. Drawless; pie rule included.
